summary: Kimi Antonelli converted pole position into victory at Spa, executing a near-perfect drive while Mercedes' championship rival George Russell retired from the race. Russell's crash handed Antonelli an unexpected gift in the title fight, prompting BBC commentators to suggest the championship would already be decided without Mercedes' ongoing reliability struggles. Antonelli's win extends his lead at the top of the standings, though Ferrari's resurgence with Lewis Hamilton's recent form suggests the battle remains far from settled.
